case_title: STASZEWSKI, ABRASHA et al VS PATOCK, JAMES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STASZEWSKI, ABRASHA CRISTINI, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $825.00 FILED BY PATOCK, JAMES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT STASZEWSKI, ABRASHA CRISTINI, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF CRISTINI, MARIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PATOCK, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT STASZEWSKI, ABRASHA CRISTINI, MARIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY STASZEWSKI, ABRASHA CRISTINI, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
